name: mere-orthodoxy
description: Mere Orthodoxy — Christian renewal for the common good.

podcast_feed_url.description: URL of the deployed podcast-feed Worker. Leave empty to hide the podcast section.

journal_status_issue.description: Issue label shown in the Journal Status tracker on the homepage (e.g. 'Spring 2026'). Bump this when a new issue enters the pipeline.

journal_status_stage.description: Current stage of the next journal issue. The matching dot glows; the other two fade. Advance manually — Drafting → In Production → Arriving — then reset to Drafting for the next issue.

content_api_key.description: Ghost Content API key for the homepage topic filter (optional).

membership_api_base.description: Base URL for the membership-site Express app (Stripe + HubSpot endpoints).

podcast_mf_apple_url.description: Apple Podcasts show URL for Mere Fidelity.

podcast_mf_spotify_url.description: Spotify show URL for Mere Fidelity.

podcast_crc_apple_url.description: Apple Podcasts show URL for Christians Reading Classics.

podcast_crc_spotify_url.description: Spotify show URL for Christians Reading Classics.

gate_days.description: Days a new post stays unrestricted before the soft subscriber gate kicks in. 0 disables the gate entirely. Soft gate only — JS overlay on the rendered article; not a real paywall. Upgrade to a worker-enforced gate later.

gate_tier.description: Who can read an article after the gate closes. 'members' = any signed-in member (free or paid). 'paid' = paying members only; free members still see the gate.

audio_worker_url.description: Full URL of the deployed mo-audio Cloudflare Worker (e.g. https://mo-audio.mo-podcast-feed.workers.dev). When set, paid Members see a 'Listen to this essay' button in the post header. Empty disables audio articles.

enable_dark_mode.description: Show a dark-mode toggle on post pages. Only the article body switches; the hero, header, and footer stay light/dark per their existing styling. Reader preference persists in localStorage across pages. Leave off until the palette is dialed in.

kit_worker_url.description: Full URL of the deployed mo-kit Cloudflare Worker (e.g. https://mo-kit.mo-podcast-feed.workers.dev). When set, signup forms pass topic/source context labels to Ghost, and engagement events (audio plays, article reads, membership clicks) are forwarded to Kit as tags. Empty disables the Kit integration entirely.

dashboard_preview_email.description: A single member email that gets full /dashboard/ access regardless of tier (for staff preview without comping yourself a membership). Leave empty to restrict /dashboard/ to paid/comped members only.

ebook_access_worker_url.description: URL of the deployed mo-ebook-access Worker (e.g. https://mo-ebook-access.mo-podcast-feed.workers.dev). When set, /dashboard/ebooks/ mints a short-lived token so paid Members skip the ebook email gate. Empty falls back to the HubSpot-list gate at each ebook.

gift_worker_url.description: URL of the deployed mo-gift Worker (e.g. https://mo-gift.mo-podcast-feed.workers.dev). When set, a 4th action button appears on gate-eligible articles for any signed-in member, letting them copy a gift link that bypasses the soft gate for the recipient. Empty hides the button.

forms_worker_url.description: URL of the deployed mo-forms Worker (e.g. https://mo-forms.mo-podcast-feed.workers.dev). Powers /contact/ and /submissions/. Empty disables those forms.

admin_worker_url.description: URL of the deployed mo-admin Worker (e.g. https://mo-admin.mo-podcast-feed.workers.dev). Powers /admin/ and its sub-pages. Empty disables the admin dashboard's data fetches (page still renders; stats stay blank).
